topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: PersonType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for a human being.

topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: DocumentType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for a paper or electronic document.

topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: ItemType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for an article or thing.

topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: OrganizationType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for a body of people organized for a particular purpose.

topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: IdentificationType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for a representation of an identity.

topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: ActivityType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for a single or set of related actions, events, or process steps.

topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: MetadataType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for information that further qualifies primary data; data about data.

topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: EmploymentAssociationType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for an association between an employee and an employer.

topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: MilitarySummaryType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for a service of a person in a military.

topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: FacilityType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for one or more buildings, places, or structures that together provide a particular service.

topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: PlanType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for a detailed proposal for doing or achieving something.

topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: LocaleType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for a geopolitical area.

topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: LocationType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for geospatial location.

topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: VehicleType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for a conveyance designed to carry an operator, passengers and/or cargo, over land.

topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: ObligationType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for something that is owed to an entity.

topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: AssessmentType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for an evaluation, appraisal, or assessment of something or someone.

topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: EmploymentPositionType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for a job, post, or group of duties and responsibilities to be performed by an employee.

topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: TaskType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for a clearly defined action or activity specifically assigned to an individual or organization that must be done as it is imposed by an appropriate authority.

topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: AddressType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for a geophysical location described by postal information.

topComplexTypesByChildCount.name: BinaryType
topComplexTypesByChildCount.documentation: A data type for a digital representation of an object encoded in a binary format.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: DirectionCodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type for compass directions.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: MilitaryDischargeCategoryCodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type for kinds of discharges a person may receive from military service.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: BinaryHashFunctionCodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type for a hash function used to generate a hash value representing an object encoded in a binary format.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: DayOfWeekCodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type for days of the week.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: PersonUnionStatusCodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type describing the legal status of a person's union with another person.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: ContactInformationAvailabilityCodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type for a period of time or a situation in which an entity is available to be contacted with the given contact information.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: EmptyReasonCodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type for a reason why a data value was not provided.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: PaymentMethodCodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type for a specific method of payment.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: PersonPronounsCodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type for a set of third-person pronouns that can be used in place of a person's name.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: AddressCategoryCodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type for a kind of address.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: FinancialAccountNumberCategoryCodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type for a kind of financial account number.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: PersonUnionCategoryCodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type describing the legally recognized union between two persons.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: PersonNameCategoryCodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type for a kind of person name.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: EmploymentPositionBasisCodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type for a nature or duration of the employment position.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: FinancialAccountHolderCodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type for a kind of financial account holder.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: ImagePoseCodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type for angles of an entity's pose in a photograph.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: PassportCategoryCodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type for a kind of passport.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: SeparationCategoryCodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type for a code that identifies the type of separation between the parties in a Person Union.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: YesNoUnknownCodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type for a ternary or three-option indicator representing true/yes, false/no, and unknown.

topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.name: MessageCategoryFATCACodeSimpleType
topSimpleTypesByEnumerationCount.documentation: A data type for kind of Foreign Account Tax Compliance Act (FATCA) message.
